description: 197 - 26-04-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson and Karen Pierce (former HM Ambassador to the United States, FCDO)

text:
Ambassador to the United States, FCDO)

From: Peter Mandelson| Personal
Sent: Sat 26/04/2025 12:00:37 PM (UTC)
To: Karen Pierce[ Personal JCS
Ce: JCS Washington Private
Officel Personal j, JCS
Personal I Personal |
Subject: Re: RHS Award 1/2

T enjoy the garden here as much if not more than anything else here. JCSis hero !

Get Outlook for iOS

From: Karen Pierce
Sent: Saturday, April 26, 2025 6:28:04 AM
To: JCS
ce: JCS __ ; Washington Private Office ; Peter Mandelson; JCS ;
Personal
Subject: Fw: RHS Award 1/2
OFFICIAL

pearJCS

In case you haven't seen it , I'm forwarding the excerpt from the RHS magazine. " The Garden",
about your award ( second photo is the full page )

Congratulations again! We will look forward to seeing you at CFS!

Tf you don't have the hard copy of The Garden and would like it, let me know and I can send it
All best

Karen and 34 Pay

Sent from Outlook for iOS

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
